name: File Manager Core Utility
description: Perform robust file operations: copy, move/rename, delete files or directories, create directories, check if a path exists, get file info, or find files by wildcard patterns inside the sandbox.

action.description: The file action to perform: "copy", "move", "delete", "mkdir", "exists", "info", or "find"

source.description: The source path to copy or move (relative to sandbox root, e.g. "notes.txt")

destination.description: The destination path for copy or move (relative to sandbox root, e.g. "backup/notes.txt")

path.description: Target path for delete, mkdir, exists, info, or find actions (relative to sandbox root, e.g. "documents")

recursive.description: Whether to perform recursive copying, deleting, or scanning (defaults to true)

pattern.description: Wildcard pattern to search for, e.g., "*.txt", "*.png" (only applicable for "find" action)
